items.item_title: Results of Operations and Financial Condition
items.summary: Q1 FY27 revenue $46.5B, +18% YoY; Datacentre +85% YoY; gross margin 75.0%. Guidance for Q2 above consensus.
Mounjaro 15mg maintenance dose Phase 3 data presented at AHA — sustained ~22% body weight reduction at 72 weeks vs 6% placebo.
Company comments on China rare-earth export licensing changes; reiterates strategic positioning of Mountain Pass operations.

items.item_title: Results of Operations and Financial Condition
items.summary: Q1 EPS $2.91 vs $2.78 est; datacentre power systems backlog at record. Raises FY guidance.

items.item_title: Departure of Directors or Certain Officers
items.summary: CFO Susan Li announces transition to Strategic Advisor role effective Aug 1, 2026. Search underway for successor.
FAA approves 737 MAX 7 type certification. Production rate cap of 38/month maintained pending further inspections.

items.item_title: Results of Operations and Financial Condition
items.summary: Q1 vehicle deliveries 387,000 vs 408,000 est; energy storage deployments 8.5 GWh (+72% YoY); auto gross margin 16.1%.

items.item_title: Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement
items.summary: AWS signs 10-year power purchase agreement with Talen Energy for 1.92 GW Susquehanna nuclear capacity — direct-feed to Cumulus datacentre campus.
